meaning: n.螺旋体,细螺旋体n.[微]钩端螺旋体,细螺旋体
examples: The data suggest that Leptospira prefers the excitement of the big city.
So far, the pathogenesis of hemorrhage caused by infection of leptospira was not elucidated.
The disease varies in severity depending on which of various types of Leptospira are present.
